prompt: A member told me they're being harassed by another member in the R-Ladies community Slack. What should I do?
assertions: Says to report to reporting@rladies.org (the Global Leadership Team)
Mentions the @Community Management Team as an in-Slack contact
Notes the Code of Conduct applies across all R-Ladies spaces
Notes a person asked to stop must comply immediately and leadership may act up to expulsion
Mentions not sharing Slack content outside Slack without consent / handling it with care
